title: Nebryx PvP + Swight
description: Clean vanilla-style PvP texture pack made for SMP gameplay, featuring low fire, small Items, side shield, clear textures, and FPS-friendly visuals for the perfect competitive experience. With addition of the classic Swight Overlay which helps to improve!
body: NebryxPvP + Swight is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft texture pack made for PvP and SMP gameplay. It keeps the default Minecraft style while improving visibility, cleaner textures, and smoother gameplay for fights and survival servers. It also adds the Swight Overlay which helps you to improve in kits like UHC or Sword!
